definitions: 繁荣；兴盛；蓬勃发展（尤指贸易、事业等）

examples.text: there was now the possibility of commerce and interaction over longer distances. And as trade flourished, so did technologies that facilitated it, like carts,
examples.explanation: 这里的 flourished 表示“繁荣起来、兴盛起来”。句子意思是：随着贸易繁荣发展，促进贸易的技术也随之发展起来，比如手推车等。

source.text: 城市化与未来的城市 - 万斯·凯特
